jsonLd.title: SIDBI is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Credit Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
